notes: Aerial view of Carowinds theme park, September 2017

notes: Entrance gate of Six Flags Great Adventure, Jackson NJ

name: Dollywood
notes: Dollywood entrance sign in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee

name: Silver Dollar City
notes: Silver Dollar City theme park in Branson, Missouri

notes: Holiday World entrance gates in Santa Claus, Indiana

name: Kentucky Kingdom
notes: Kentucky Kingdom entrance fountain, Louisville, 2021

name: Six Flags Darien Lake
notes: Predator wooden roller coaster lift hill at Darien Lake

name: Playland Park
notes: Wide shot of Playland Beach and park in Rye, New York, landscape orientation

name: Adventure Park USA
notes: No Wikimedia Commons images available. Small family entertainment center in Monrovia, Maryland with go-karts, mini golf, and indoor attractions.

name: Lake Compounce
notes: Lake Compounce main gate entrance, oldest continuously operating amusement park in North America

name: Tom Foolery's Adventure Park
notes: Indoor entertainment center inside Kalahari Resort (Wisconsin Dells and Round Rock TX). Not a traditional theme park.

name: YesterLand Farm
notes: Pumpkin farm and seasonal agritourism attraction in Canton, TX. Has some amusement rides but primarily a farm attraction, not a theme park.

name: Canobie Lake Park
notes: Canobie Lake Park with Untamed roller coaster visible, Salem, New Hampshire

name: Elitch Gardens
notes: Elitch Gardens Theme Park entrance in Denver, Colorado, 2009. Carol Highsmith photo.

name: Jenkinson's Boardwalk
notes: View south along Jenkinson's Boardwalk at Parkway in Point Pleasant Beach, NJ

name: Luna Park (NJ)
notes: Luna Parc in NJ is an art installation/museum by Ricky Boscarino, not an amusement park. No traditional theme park by this name exists in NJ.

name: Steel Pier
notes: Panoramic view of Steel Pier amusement park in Atlantic City, NJ with Ferris wheel and boardwalk

name: Universal Studios Florida
notes: Universal Studios Florida entrance arch, Orlando

name: Adventure City
notes: Landscape photo of Adventure City park, 2736x1824 original

name: Altoona
notes: Altoona is a city in Pennsylvania, not a theme park. Possibly refers to DelGrosso's Park (in nearby Tipton) or Lakemont Park, but the entry is just the city name.

name: Bengtson's Pumpkin Farm
notes: Seasonal pumpkin farm and fall festival in Homer Glen, IL. Has some kiddie amusement rides but is primarily a farm/seasonal attraction.

name: Camden Park
notes: Entrance sign to Camden Park, Huntington, WV. Library of Congress / Carol Highsmith photo.

name: City Forum
notes: Indoor family entertainment center in Clarksville, TN (go-karts, bowling, laser tag, arcade). Not a traditional theme park.

name: DelGrosso's Park
notes: DelGrosso's Amusement Park in Tipton, Pennsylvania

name: Family Kingdom Amusement Park
notes: Family Kingdom Amusement Park oceanfront view in Myrtle Beach, SC

name: Frankie's Fun Park
notes: Chain of family entertainment centers in the Carolinas (go-karts, mini golf, arcade, bowling). Not a traditional theme park.

name: Funtasticks
notes: Small 5-acre family fun park in Tucson, AZ with go-karts, mini golf, bumper boats. Not a traditional theme park.

name: Go-Karts Plus
notes: Go-kart and family entertainment center in Williamsburg, VA. Not a traditional theme park.

name: Idlewild SoakZone
notes: Wide landscape shot of Idlewild park area near Ligonier, PA. Third oldest operating amusement park in the US.

name: Jungle Jim's Playland
notes: Defunct indoor family entertainment chain (Midvale UT location closed). Indoor playground and mini amusement park concept, not a traditional theme park.

name: Lakeside Amusement Park
notes: Lakeside Amusement Park in Denver, Colorado, 1966 vintage photo showing the Tower of Jewels and park layout

name: Magic Harbor
notes: Magic Harbor lighthouse sign in Surfside Beach, SC. Park is defunct (closed mid-1990s). Library of Congress photo.

name: Midway Park
notes: Carousel at Midway State Park in Maple Springs, NY. 15th oldest continually operating amusement park in the US.

name: New Philadelphia Ohio
notes: New Philadelphia is a city in Ohio, not a theme park.

name: Oakland Zoo
notes: Oakland Zoo entrance in Oakland, California. Primarily a zoo, has some amusement rides.

name: Parque Warner Madrid
notes: Entrance to Parque Warner Madrid theme park in San Martin de la Vega, Spain

name: Quassy Amusement Waterpark
notes: Quassy Amusement Park on Lake Quassapaug in Middlebury, Connecticut

name: Safari Land
notes: 62,000 sq ft indoor entertainment center in Villa Park, IL (bowling, arcade, indoor coaster). Not a traditional theme park.

name: Scene75
notes: Indoor entertainment center chain in Ohio and Chicago area (go-karts, laser tag, arcade). Not a traditional theme park.

name: St. Louis MO
notes: St. Louis is a city in Missouri, not a theme park. Possibly refers to Six Flags St. Louis, but the entry is just the city name.

name: Trimper Rides Of Ocean City
notes: Ocean City MD Boardwalk with Trimper's Rides area visible, August 2009

name: Wonderla
notes: Wide aerial/overview shot of Wonderla amusement park in Bangalore, India
